base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of rope_crawl — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Rope — snake enemy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Rope — snake enemy; 2-frame slither. Charges Link in straight line when sighted
